other_info:
Volunteering

Teaching Assistant for VLSI revisited Course

Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Jun 2021 - Jul 2021 · 2 mos

Education

Worked as a Teaching Assistant for the Digital VLSI Design course helping students with schematic capture for Standard Cell, layout design, and pre and post layout simulation with PPA analysis.

projects.raw_text:
High Speed Dual Port Memory Compiler Design

Apr 2021 – Present


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Part of a team working on High Speed Dual Port Memory Compiler
involving the complete design of Memory Core (using bitline hierarchy), I/Os,
Control block and Row Decoders. Specific role: “Testability of the
memory” .Screening circuit for asynchronous read and write disturb
having configurable delays. Design of Scan Folps, BIST mux and Memory
Bypass circuitry.

Design Test to identify WL coupling fault in dual port SRAM in 65 nm Technology

Feb 2021 – Apr 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Design of dual port 8T SRAM Array with specified FOMs- read current,
write margin and SNM. Stimuli to test the effect of WL coupling. Analysis
on different aspect ratio of the array with variation in PVT conditions.
Design of a detector circuit to detect the coupling fault. Layout of the
SRAM Cell and detector circuit.

HW-SW co-design of Scalable-Floating-Point Matrix Inversion Using Xilinx SDSoC

Jan 2021 – Apr 2021

Highly efficient and scalable hardware implementation of complex
matrix inversion Algorithm using LUP decomposition.

RTL to GDS for ASIC Design Flow using 90 nm PDK

Jan 2021 – Apr 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

RTL coding, code coverage, RTL simulation, logic synthesis, logical
equivalence, STA, scan chain insertion, floor planning,
placement, CTS, routing GDS and timing closure.

Design of a TSPC (True Single Phase Clock) Flipflop in 65 nm Technology

Oct 2020 – Dec 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Characterization of delays, setup, hold and metastability window. Power-
Performance -Area Analysis with pre and post layout simulations.

Extended -Implementation of Scan TSPC FF and its comparison with Static
transmission gate based Scan FF.

Parcel Delivery bot using Arduino UNO

Apr 2016 – Jun 2016

Show project
It was a self-project for a tech-fest in Jadavpur University. The bot is assigned the task to collect parcels from the maze and deliver it to its destination using the shortest path. Arduino UNO was used as the microprocessor. IR  transmitter and receiver pair array were used for line detection and ultrasonic sensor for parcel detection. The Left Hand on the Wall algorithm was used for determining the shortest path.

Design of a Band-Gap Voltage Regulator with two stage Opamp in 65 nm Technology


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

A high gain Two stage Opamp with miller compensation and nulling resistor as the Opamp for BGR circuit having good temperature coefficient and PSSR characteristics.
